summary: Verified 2 critical bug fixes: (1) Chain of Custody now validates addresses based on selected chain type - Solana shows 'coming soon' message instead of 'Invalid EVM address format' error. (2) Tax calculations no longer treat 'send' and 'withdrawal' as taxable dispositions - only 'sell' and 'trade' trigger realized gains. All 14 new tests pass. 42 regression tests pass.

test_results.backend: 100% (14/14 new bug fix tests + 42/42 regression tests)
test_results.frontend: N/A - No frontend changes in this iteration

context_for_next_testing_agent: Both critical bugs are fixed and verified. Chain of Custody properly validates addresses per chain type. Tax service correctly excludes send/withdrawal from realized gains calculations.

bugs_verified_fixed.description: Chain of Custody showing 'Invalid EVM address format' for Solana addresses
Incorrect realized gains ($210K) because send/withdrawal treated as taxable sales
